narratives.evidence_quote: सब जानते हैं, अमेरिका यूक्रेन के पाले में खड़ा है और रूस को परास्त करने के सपने दे रहा है।
narratives.reasoning: This quote criticizes the United States for supporting Ukraine with the dream of defeating Russia, portraying Western (specifically American) involvement as driven by aggressive ambitions rather than legitimate diplomacy, which fits the narrative of discrediting Western actions and motives.

narratives.evidence_quote: लेकिन अमेरिका, ‘नाटो’ और अन्य पश्चिमी देशों के आर्थिक—सैन्य सहयोग के सामने रूस सीना ताने खड़ा है और हथियार डालने को तैयार नहीं है।
narratives.reasoning: The text praises Russia's resilience and determination, stating it stands firm against the combined economic and military support of the US, NATO, and other Western countries, and is not ready to surrender, which is a positive portrayal of Russia's strength and resolve.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West is weak
subnarratives.evidence_quote: लेकिन अमेरिका, ‘नाटो’ और अन्य पश्चिमी देशों के आर्थिक—सैन्य सहयोग के सामने रूस सीना ताने खड़ा है और हथियार डालने को तैयार नहीं है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly presents Russia as defiant and unyielding despite the economic and military support from the US, NATO, and other Western countries, framing the West's collective effort as insufficient to subdue Russia, which aligns with the definition of portraying the West as non-potent or weak.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West does not care about Ukraine, only about its interests
subnarratives.evidence_quote: सब जानते हैं, अमेरिका यूक्रेन के पाले में खड़ा है और रूस को परास्त करने के सपने दे रहा है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement frames US support for Ukraine not as genuine concern for Ukraine's fate, but as a self-interested pursuit of its own goal to defeat Russia, fitting the subnarrative that the West is only interested in Ukraine for its own benefits.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russia has international support from a number of countries and people
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस और यूक्रेन युद्ध के बीच रूस और चीन की निकटताओं में एक उभार देखने को मिला है। चीन के राष्ट्रपति शी जिनपिंग ने राष्ट्रपति पुतिन को अपने यहां बुलाकर खूब स्वागत—सत्कार किया। पुतिन ने भी शी को मास्को बुलाया था।
subnarratives.reasoning: The quote explicitly describes growing closeness and mutual hospitality between Russia and China, portraying Russia as having significant international support from a major power, which aligns with the subnarrative definition of emphasising Russia's popularity and acceptance on the international stage.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: लेकिन अमेरिका, ‘नाटो’ और अन्य पश्चिमी देशों के आर्थिक—सैन्य सहयोग के सामने रूस सीना ताने खड़ा है और हथियार डालने को तैयार नहीं है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement portrays Russia as resilient and defiant against a coalition of powerful Western nations, actively promoting a positive image of Russian steadfastness and strength in the face of adversity. This supports the parent narrative of praising Russia but does not fit any of the more specific subnarrative definitions provided.
